Short CV

Fatma DEMİR completed her undergraduate education at Uskudar University, Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Occupational Therapy in 2019. Afterwards, she worked as an occupational therapist in a private clinic and rehabilitation center. After her graduation, she started her master’s degree in Neuroscience at Uskudar University in the same year and still continues. She is currently working as a research assistant in the Department of Occupational Therapy, Faculty of Health Sciences.
